mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_management_lists (user_list_name, file_path, original_file_name, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userListName}, #{filePath}, #{originalFileName}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user_management_lists SET user_list_name = #{userListName}, file_path = #{filePath}, original_file_name = #{originalFileName}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_list_name, file_path, original_file_name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM user_management_lists ORDER BY created_at DESC
